LONG NAME: NN_CORE_TRNSPRTN_CSP_UNAVBL_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “NN” include information for each core and supplemental HRSN for which a 
beneficiary received navigation services. 

Navigation outcome variables the transportation HRSN (i.e., NN_CORE_TRNSPRTN_RSLVD_SW, 
NN_CORE_TRNSPRT CNCT_CSP_SW, NN_CORE_TRNSPRTN_OPTOUT_SW, 
NN_CORE_TRNSPRTN_CNTCT_FAIL_SW,
